meaning: n.(爱斯基摩人中的)阿留申人,阿留申语
examples: Tooth analyses also suggest that there were two later migrations of Na-Denes and Eskimo-Aleut.
The third wave, perhaps 10,000 or 9,000 years ago, saw the migration from North-east Asia of groups ancestral to the modern Eskimo and Aleut.
Most languages derive from one parent language. Mednyj Aleut has two parents.
